title: Expert for Hire! | Wildcard Insights

posts.author: WildcardInsights (Anne Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Wildcard Insights here to help with any and all your Monday.com needs.

As an operational powerhouse & tool implementation expert from change management to process optimization, I have built & customized entire work management tools within Monday.com, curating it to every team and companies’ need. Including, but not limited to, Zapier and Make.com integrations, G-Suite/Slack/Adobe/Microsoft/Mailchimp etc. automations.

I can train and onboard entire companies/brands on how to use new tools, customizing the experience to each person’s job function within Monday.com.

I come with over 15 years of art education and marketing experience combined, organized, detail-oriented & have a knack for setting up system logic.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Anne Schneider

Welcome to the community

I can help you integrate Monday.com with various tools and streamline your workflows. With expertise in setting up and customizing Monday.com, we’ll design a solution tailored to your team’s specific needs, including seamless integrations with Zapier, Make.com, G-Suite, Slack, Adobe, Microsoft, and Mailchimp.

We’ll create automations and workflows within Monday.com to optimize your processes, improve efficiency, and ensure smooth operations. Plus, I can provide comprehensive training and onboarding for your team, customizing the experience to match each person’s role and responsibilities.

posts.author: WildcardInsights (Anne Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Appreciate you replying. I am offering the same services as well! Let me know if you are interested in partnering together on any future work. Thanks!
